news.title:
Muthoot Finance plans to enter the insurance distribution business, seeking shareholder approval for MoA amendment.
If approved, it will distribute life, general, health insurance, and other products per IRDAI regulations.
news.summary:
Muthoot Finance plans to enter the insurance distribution business, seeking shareholder approval for MoA amendment.
If approved, it will distribute life, general, health insurance, and other products per IRDAI regulations.

news.title:
Muthoot Finance seeks shareholder approval to enter the insurance corporate agent and intermediary business.
The proposed move includes dealing in all types of insurance services.
news.summary:
Muthoot Finance seeks shareholder approval to enter the insurance corporate agent and intermediary business.
The proposed move includes dealing in all types of insurance services.

news.title:
HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, CRISIL, and Swaraj Engines lead expected dividend announcements this week, with Swaraj Engines projecting Rs 109.2/share.
Investors should monitor record dates like Muthoot Finance's April 17 ex-dividend date and consider banking, engineering, and insurance sectors for opportunities.
news.summary:
HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, CRISIL, and Swaraj Engines lead expected dividend announcements this week, with Swaraj Engines projecting Rs 109.2/share.
Investors should monitor record dates like Muthoot Finance's April 17 ex-dividend date and consider banking, engineering, and insurance sectors for opportunities.

news.title: Stocks to watch: Muthoot Finance, Shriram Finance, L&T, Lupin, Coforge.
news.summary: Stocks to watch: Muthoot Finance, Shriram Finance, L&T, Lupin, Coforge.

news.title:
M&M, Adani Green Energy, and L&T among stocks in focus amid weak market sentiment due to Middle East tensions.
Adani Green's capacity grew 35% YoY; L&T Realty acquired 100% in International Green Scapes. Muthoot Finance announced ₹30/share dividend.
news.summary:
M&M, Adani Green Energy, and L&T among stocks in focus amid weak market sentiment due to Middle East tensions.
Adani Green's capacity grew 35% YoY; L&T Realty acquired 100% in International Green Scapes. Muthoot Finance announced ₹30/share dividend.

news.title:
Muthoot Finance approved ₹30/share interim dividend; M&M reported higher March '26 production/sales led by utility vehicles.
Lupin launched dapagliflozin in the US; Torrent Pharma's Gujarat oncology unit was inspected by USFDA from April 6-10, '26.
news.summary:
Muthoot Finance approved ₹30/share interim dividend; M&M reported higher March '26 production/sales led by utility vehicles.
Lupin launched dapagliflozin in the US; Torrent Pharma's Gujarat oncology unit was inspected by USFDA from April 6-10, '26.

news.title:
Aurobindo Pharma, Muthoot Finance among firms trading ex-dividend this week.
Corporate actions include dividends, stock splits, income distributions, and buybacks.
news.summary:
Aurobindo Pharma, Muthoot Finance among firms trading ex-dividend this week.
Corporate actions include dividends, stock splits, income distributions, and buybacks.

news.title:
Muthoot Finance announces record interim dividend of Rs 30/share for FY26, totaling Rs 1,204.4 crore.
Stock rose 2.8% to Rs 3,573.90; analysts predict 14% upside with Rs 4,075.25 target. YTD down 6.2%.
news.summary:
Muthoot Finance announces record interim dividend of Rs 30/share for FY26, totaling Rs 1,204.4 crore.
Stock rose 2.8% to Rs 3,573.90; analysts predict 14% upside with Rs 4,075.25 target. YTD down 6.2%.

news.title: Muthoot Finance board approves ₹30/share dividend, rewarding shareholders.
news.summary: Muthoot Finance board approves ₹30/share dividend, rewarding shareholders.

news.title:
Aurobindo Pharma, Muthoot Finance, Pashupati Cotspin, and Prima Plastics announce key corporate actions, including buybacks, dividends, stock splits, and spinoffs.
Aurobindo Pharma's ₹800 Cr buyback, Muthoot's interim dividend, Pashupati's 1:10 stock split, and Prima's spinoff aim to enhance shareholder value and liquidity.
news.summary:
Aurobindo Pharma, Muthoot Finance, Pashupati Cotspin, and Prima Plastics announce key corporate actions, including buybacks, dividends, stock splits, and spinoffs.
Aurobindo Pharma's ₹800 Cr buyback, Muthoot's interim dividend, Pashupati's 1:10 stock split, and Prima's spinoff aim to enhance shareholder value and liquidity.

news.title:
Infosys partners with Harness for AI-led software delivery; GAIL signs LNG carrier deal with Alpha Gas.
SRF faces ₹327.4 cr tax demand; Muthoot Finance sets FY26 interim dividend record date as Apr 13, 2026.
news.summary:
Infosys partners with Harness for AI-led software delivery; GAIL signs LNG carrier deal with Alpha Gas.
SRF faces ₹327.4 cr tax demand; Muthoot Finance sets FY26 interim dividend record date as Apr 13, 2026.

news.title:
Muthoot Finance's board to meet on April 10, 2026, to consider an interim dividend.
Record date for dividend entitlement set as April 13, 2026; payment within 30 days of declaration.
news.summary:
Muthoot Finance's board to meet on April 10, 2026, to consider an interim dividend.
Record date for dividend entitlement set as April 13, 2026; payment within 30 days of declaration.

news.title:
Muthoot Finance closes above 20 DMA and 200 DMA with rising volumes.
Bollinger Band breakout and short-term MA crossover signal potential upside.
news.summary:
Muthoot Finance closes above 20 DMA and 200 DMA with rising volumes.
Bollinger Band breakout and short-term MA crossover signal potential upside.

news.title:
Mid, smallcap indices rebounded sharply; Nifty Midcap 100 rose 3.1%, Smallcap 100 up 3.5%.
Muthoot Finance surged 14%, GRSE jumped 18%, while crude prices and US bond yields declined.
news.summary:
Mid, smallcap indices rebounded sharply; Nifty Midcap 100 rose 3.1%, Smallcap 100 up 3.5%.
Muthoot Finance surged 14%, GRSE jumped 18%, while crude prices and US bond yields declined.

news.title:
Muthoot Finance faces Rs. 977.8 Cr tax demand for ESOP, TDS, bad debts.
Company to appeal; expects no material financial impact from the issue.
news.summary:
Muthoot Finance faces Rs. 977.8 Cr tax demand for ESOP, TDS, bad debts.
Company to appeal; expects no material financial impact from the issue.

news.title:
6 Nifty 500 stocks with consistent 2025 PAT growth fell up to 35% YTD, despite earnings momentum.
Aegis Vopak, SBFC, IOB, and Muthoot Finance face pressures from rising crude, inflation, and market volatility.
news.summary:
6 Nifty 500 stocks with consistent 2025 PAT growth fell up to 35% YTD, despite earnings momentum.

news.title:
Muthoot Finance may see USD 49M inflows from Nifty semi-annual rejig.
Shares likely reacting to the 3 PM index rebalancing announcement today.
news.summary:
Muthoot Finance may see USD 49M inflows from Nifty semi-annual rejig.

news.title:
Gold and silver prices fell 22% and 45% from peaks, impacting stocks like PC Jeweller, Kalyan Jewellers, Muthoot Finance, and Manappuram Finance.
Jewellery retailers like Titan may benefit from higher demand, while gold financiers and silver-linked firms like Vedanta face short-term challenges.
news.summary:
Gold and silver prices fell 22% and 45% from peaks, impacting stocks like PC Jeweller, Kalyan Jewellers, Muthoot Finance, and Manappuram Finance.
Jewellery retailers like Titan may benefit from higher demand, while gold financiers and silver-linked firms like Vedanta face short-term challenges.

news.title:
Mid, smallcap indices plunged; Nifty Midcap 100 fell 3.5% and Nifty Smallcap 100 dropped 3.8%.
Stocks like Muthoot Finance, Voltas, SAIL, Paytm, and Firstcry declined over 5% amid global geopolitical tensions.
news.summary:
Mid, smallcap indices plunged; Nifty Midcap 100 fell 3.5% and Nifty Smallcap 100 dropped 3.8%.
Stocks like Muthoot Finance, Voltas, SAIL, Paytm, and Firstcry declined over 5% amid global geopolitical tensions.

news.title: Muthoot Finance and Manappuram shares fell up to 5% on Monday.
news.summary: Muthoot Finance and Manappuram shares fell up to 5% on Monday.
